Operation 'createRoutes' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies what inputs are expected (delivery IDs and parameters), what is returned (route objects with sequences and ETAs), and side effects (routes become available for assignment). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and what state changes occur.

data.current_description: Create optimized routes from given deliveries.
data.description_suggestion: Create optimized delivery routes from a set of deliveries. Accepts delivery IDs and optional routing parameters. Returns newly created route(s) with assigned delivery sequences and estimated delivery times. Routes are immediately available for driver assignment and tracking.
data.reasoning: Current description is too minimal. Enhanced version clarifies what inputs are expected (delivery IDs and parameters), what is returned (route objects with sequences and ETAs), and side effects (routes become available for assignment). This helps AI agents understand the operation's full scope and what state changes occur.

message: Operation 'addDeliveryToRoute' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Current description lacks critical details about inputs (route ID requirement), processing behavior (re-optimization), and outputs (updated route with new sequence). Enhanced version specifies required parameters, explains the re-optimization side effect, and clarifies the returned data structure. This enables AI agents to understand prerequisites and consequences of the operation.

data.current_description: Add one or more deliveries to an existing route.
data.description_suggestion: Add one or more deliveries to an existing route. Requires the route ID and delivery IDs to be added. The route will be re-optimized to incorporate new deliveries into the delivery sequence. Returns the updated route with revised delivery order and estimated completion time.
data.reasoning: Current description lacks critical details about inputs (route ID requirement), processing behavior (re-optimization), and outputs (updated route with new sequence). Enhanced version specifies required parameters, explains the re-optimization side effect, and clarifies the returned data structure. This enables AI agents to understand prerequisites and consequences of the operation.

message: Operation 'assignDriverToRoute' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is ambiguous (mentions both delivery and route). Description lists assignment methods but lacks clarity on what happens after assignment (state transition to 'assigned'). Enhanced version clarifies the target is the route, explains the four assignment options more clearly, specifies the resulting state change, and indicates what data is returned. This improves AI agent understanding of when to use this operation and what to expect.

data.current_summary: Assign driver to delivery or route
data.current_description: Assign a courier/driver to a delivery or route by courier ID, vehicle ID, vehicle reference, or by creating a new driver.
data.description_suggestion: Assign a courier/driver to a route using one of four methods: existing courier ID, vehicle ID, vehicle reference, or by creating a new driver inline. The route status transitions to assigned and becomes available for execution. Returns the updated route with assigned driver/courier information and vehicle details.
data.reasoning: Summary is ambiguous (mentions both delivery and route). Description lists assignment methods but lacks clarity on what happens after assignment (state transition to 'assigned'). Enhanced version clarifies the target is the route, explains the four assignment options more clearly, specifies the resulting state change, and indicates what data is returned. This improves AI agent understanding of when to use this operation and what to expect.

message: Operation 'changeRouteStatus' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description is too generic and doesn't explain what status values are valid or what is returned. Enhanced version specifies the route identification method (route ID parameter), lists valid status transitions, and clarifies the response includes the updated route with timestamp. This helps AI agents understand valid inputs and expected outputs.

data.current_description: Update the status of a specific route.
data.description_suggestion: Update the status of a specific route identified by route ID. Accepts new status values such as pending, assigned, in_progress, completed, or cancelled. Returns the updated route object with the new status and timestamp of the status change.
data.reasoning: Current description is too generic and doesn't explain what status values are valid or what is returned. Enhanced version specifies the route identification method (route ID parameter), lists valid status transitions, and clarifies the response includes the updated route with timestamp. This helps AI agents understand valid inputs and expected outputs.

message: Operation 'getCountries' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, unclear_purpose, missing_context. The current summary 'Get countries' is misleading as the operation's primary purpose is health/connectivity validation, not country retrieval. The description doesn't clarify the dual purpose or explain when/why an AI agent should use this endpoint. Added context about authentication validation, connectivity verification, and clarified the return value.

data.current_description: Test endpoint for validating credentials and API connectivity.
data.description_suggestion: Health check endpoint for validating API credentials and verifying connectivity to the Shippify API. Returns a list of supported countries. Use this endpoint to test your authentication credentials (APP_ID and APP_SECRET) and confirm the API is accessible before making operational requests.
data.reasoning: The current summary 'Get countries' is misleading as the operation's primary purpose is health/connectivity validation, not country retrieval. The description doesn't clarify the dual purpose or explain when/why an AI agent should use this endpoint. Added context about authentication validation, connectivity verification, and clarified the return value.

data.current_description: Create one or more deliveries (up to 100 per request).
data.description_suggestion: Create one or more deliveries in the system (up to 100 per request). Accepts delivery details including pickup and dropoff locations, contact information, and package specifications. Returns confirmation with delivery IDs and status for each created delivery. Created deliveries are immediately available for tracking and management.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks critical details about expected inputs (location, contact, package info), what is returned (delivery IDs, status), and side effects (deliveries become immediately available). Enhanced description helps AI agents understand the full scope of the operation.

data.current_description: Retrieve complete information about a specific delivery.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve complete information about a specific delivery by delivery ID. Returns comprehensive delivery details including status, pickup and dropoff locations, contact information, package details, tracking information, and delivery timestamps. Use this endpoint to get the full delivery record for tracking, auditing, or status verification purposes.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear but description is too generic. Added specificity about the required input (delivery ID), detailed output information (status, locations, contacts, package details, timestamps), and use cases to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Modify dropoff details for one or more deliveries (up to 10).
data.description_suggestion: Modify dropoff location and contact details for one or more deliveries (up to 10 per request). Changes take effect immediately and affect active delivery routing and tracking.

data.current_description: Update the status of a specific delivery.
data.description_suggestion: Update the status of a specific delivery by delivery ID. Accepts status change requests with new status and optional reason/notes. Returns the updated delivery record with new status and timestamp. Status changes trigger notifications and may affect delivery routing, tracking visibility, and customer communications.
